zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Hastings於1130年出生在英國瓦維其可爾費隆格利時，他的父親Hugh de Hastings32歲，母親Erneburga Flamville28歲。他和Maud Banastre至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他於1150年被列為steward to king henry ii。他去世於1195年在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾費隆格利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Hastings于1130年出生在英国瓦維其可爾費隆格利时，他的父亲Hugh de Hastings32岁，母亲Erneburga Flamville28岁。他和Maud Banastre至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他于1150年被列为steward to king henry ii。他去世于1195年在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾費隆格利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Hastings was born in 1130, in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, his father, Hugh de Hastings, was 32 and his mother, Erneburga Flamville, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Maud Banastre. In 1150, at the age of 20, his occupation is listed as steward to king henry ii. He died in 1195, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Hastings est né en 1130, à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Hastings, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Erneburga Flamville, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Maud Banastre. En 1150, à l’âge de 20 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est steward to king henry ii. Il est décédé en 1195, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Hastings 1130 in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Hastings 32 und seine Mutter Erneburga Flamville 28. Er hatte mit Maud Banastre mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1150, als er 20 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als steward to king henry ii aufgeführt. Er starb 1195 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Hastings è nato il nel 1130 nel Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Hastings, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Erneburga Flamville, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Maud Banastre. Nel 1150, all'età di 20 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward to king henry ii. Morì nel 1195, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Fillongley, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Hastingsが1130年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーで生まれた時，父Hugh de Hastingsは32歳，母Erneburga Flamvilleは28歳であった。彼はMaud Banastreとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1150年，20歳の時，職業はsteward to king henry iiと記録されている。彼は1195年に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Hastings(이)가 1130년 영국 워윅실르 피론글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Hastings(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Erneburga Flamville(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Maud Banastre(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1150년, 20세의 나이로 그의 직업은 steward to king henry ii이었다. 그는 1195년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 피론글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Hastings nasceu em 1130, em Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Hastings, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Erneburga Flamville, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Maud Banastre. Em 1150, com 20 anos, sua profissão aparece como steward to king henry ii. Ele faleceu em 1195, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Hastings родился в 1130 г. в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Hastings было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Erneburga Flamville, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Maud Banastre. В 1150 году, в возрасте 20 лет,  он работал по профессии steward to king henry ii. Он умер в 1195 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия.
